nodes.name: Cron 06:30 KL
nodes.notes: Daily at 06:30 Asia/Kuala_Lumpur. Set timezone in n8n global settings (Settings → General → Timezone) OR on this node's Trigger Timezone, else cron runs in UTC.

nodes.name: Fetch Daily Prep
nodes.notes: Same N8N API Key Header Auth credential as before. IMPORTANT: hit www.incredibowl.my (not incredibowl.my) — apex 307-redirects drop the Authorization header.

nodes.name: Build Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Composes the full Telegram HTML message in JS. Edit message structure here — no Meta template approval needed, changes go live immediately on next cron.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Send via Telegram Bot API. chatId is BowlMama's personal chat with the bot — get it via https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates after she sends the bot any message. parse_mode=HTML so <b> tags render bold.
